en: I'm not your kid.
You said you were going to Chicago.
My daughter can't see me this weekend.
ko: 내 딸은 이번 주말에 나를 못 봐.

en: She's going skiing.
You said she was 4 years old.
You're lying.
She was 4 when I left. Now she's 15.
My wife's been remarried for 11 years.
I see Grace every now and again.
I don't understand.
Sure you do.
Sometimes it's easier to live in the lie.
ko: 때로는 거짓말 속에 사는 게 더 쉬운 거야.

en: I'm going to let you fly tonight, Frank.
ko: 오늘 밤 너를 자유롭게 해줄게, 프랭크.

en: I'm not even going to try to stop you.
ko: 나는 너를 막으려고 하지도 않을 거야.

en: Because I know you'll be back on Monday. Yeah.
How do you know I'll come back?
ko: 어떻게 내가 돌아온다는 걸 아는 거야?

en: Look...
Frank, nobody's chasing you.
ko: 프랭크, 아무도 너를 쫓고 있지 않아.

en: American Airlines Flight 131 to Pittsburgh is now ready for boarding Passengers with boarding
ko: 아메리칸 항공 9131편, 피츠버그행 탑승 준비 완료.

en: passes please proceed to Gate 23A
